headline: What's Happening With BigBear.ai Stock?
summary: BigBear.ai (BBAI) is a company telling very different stories right now.  A story is told by the stock ticker, which shows a return of -31.1% over the last six months, a period when the broader S&P 500 gained +10.0%.  Another story comes from management, which insists its strategy of providing “mission-ready AI” to national security and commercial clients is working.

headline: Gartner Marketing Survey Finds Awareness and Conversion Account for 62.6% of Total Media Spend
summary: DENVER, June 08, 2026--Awareness and conversion now account for 62.6% of total media spend, as CMOs shift budget toward acquisition and digital channels in pursuit of growth, according to a survey by Gartner, Inc., a business and technology insights company.

headline: Baron Discovery Fund Q1 2026: Who Moved The Needle
summary: Baron Discovery Fund declined 10.65% in Q1 2026, trailing its benchmark due to software headwinds. Read the full analysis for more details.
